name: Orange Ginger Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts, boned, skinned and pounded flat
1 tbsp Cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zest and juice from 2 oranges and a lemon. Set aside.
2. Squeeze the juice from the remaining orange and lemon. Set aside.
3. Section one-third of another orange and set the sections aside.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Add chicken pieces, ginger, and garlic to the skillet. Cook until chicken is brown on both sides.
6. Reduce heat to low. Add onion, red pepper strips, and snow peas to the skillet. Cook gently while combining juices, soy sauce, hoisin sauce, and cornstarch mixture.
7. Stir well and add the sauce to the skillet. Continue stirring over medium heat until the sauce thickens and coats the chicken and vegetables.
8. Add the orange segments. Serve immediately on hot plates. Makes 4 servings.
Origin: Appeal, Fall 1992. Shared by: Sharon Stevens
